title: MiniMax M2.7: Run AI Agents for $20/Month?
summary: Keith AI tests MiniMax M2.7 against OpenAI and DeepSeek for real agent workflows including social media drafting, translation, API scheduling, and image generation. The review claims 80% cost reduction without sacrificing results on most tasks and identifies token efficiency as a key advantage of MiniMax M2.7.
